sourceRefs.description: MTA Bus Time SIRI vehicle monitoring

recommendations.action: Field-verify PIKE ST/MADISON ST to PIKE ST/SOUTH ST during weekday AM peak.
recommendations.reason: The top segment combines low historical speed with nearby curb and traffic complaint signals.
recommendations.humanReviewNote: Confirm field conditions before operational action.

recommendations.action: Review bus-lane and camera enforcement eligibility for the priority segment.
recommendations.reason: Bus-lane context overlaps with at least one slow segment and optional evidence suggests possible blockage.
recommendations.humanReviewNote: This is not an enforcement conclusion; eligibility must be checked by authorized staff.

recommendations.action: Evaluate nearby loading-zone or curb-management changes to reduce recurring curb conflicts.
recommendations.reason: Relevant 311 complaints and optional visual evidence are consistent with curbside activity affecting bus movement.
recommendations.humanReviewNote: Verify signage, land use, and loading demand before recommending curb changes.

recommendations.action: Re-run ClearLane after any intervention to compare before/after segment speeds.
recommendations.reason: A repeatable audit ledger and metrics artifact can support transparent intervention review.
recommendations.humanReviewNote: Use comparable dates, days of week, and time periods for before/after review.

disclaimer: ClearLane is a decision-support tool. Findings are based on available data and optional visual evidence. They require human review before operational, enforcement, or policy action.
